nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=46 beats='{HERO} spreads {ENTRANCE} in {THRESHOLD} for a {GOAL}; {CONTAINER} is empty and no {GUESTS} are here yet; she claps her paws and decides what to fetch first'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='{HERO} pads to {ROUTE_A_CHAR} to ask for {ROUTE_A_OFFER}; {ROUTE_A_LURE} hum kindly in the sun; she can ask nicely and wait or poke {ROUTE_A_CHAR} to hurry them along'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='{ROUTE_A_LURE} fill {ROUTE_A_OFFER} and {HERO} hugs it close; the {GOAL} is growing; she can carry it back to {ENTRANCE} or call {GUESTS} and start the {GOAL} now'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=44 beats='{HERO} pokes {ROUTE_A_CHAR} and out floats {ROUTE_A_MISHAP} that chase her in a silly circle round {THRESHOLD}; nobody is stung and she giggles, trotting back to {ENTRANCE} to try again the gentle way'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='{HERO} skips to {ROUTE_B_CHAR} for {ROUTE_B_OFFER}; plump ripe ones sit low and shiny; she can pick the easy low berries or stretch up for the wobbly high ones'>>

choices.label: Stretch for the wobbly high ones.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='{HERO}'s basket fills with sweet {ROUTE_B_LURE} that stain her paws pink; the {GOAL} keeps growing; she can carry them back to {ENTRANCE} or call {GUESTS} and start the {GOAL} now'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=44 beats='{HERO} stretches for the high {ROUTE_B_LURE}, the branch springs back, and {ROUTE_B_OFFER} tips into the soft grass with a plop; {ROUTE_B_MISHAP} roll everywhere and she laughs, heading back to {ENTRANCE} to start over'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='{HERO} remembers {ROUTE_C_LURE} is somewhere in {ROUTE_C_CHAR}; she hunts for it happily; she can follow the little bounce marks or just dive into the grass headfirst'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='there in {ROUTE_C_CHAR} sits {ROUTE_C_LURE}, just right for a {GOAL} game; the fun is growing; she can roll it back to {ENTRANCE} or call {GUESTS} and start the {GOAL} now'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=44 beats='{HERO} dives into {ROUTE_C_CHAR} and pops up with {ROUTE_C_MISHAP} on her nose instead of {ROUTE_C_LURE}; she sneezes a giggly sneeze and trots back to {ENTRANCE} to look for {ROUTE_C_LURE} again later'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='{HERO} wants {ROUTE_D_LURE} for the breezy {THRESHOLD}; it lies folded by {ROUTE_D_CHAR}; she can carry it gently under her arm or let it flap wide open in the wind'>>

choices.label: Let {ROUTE_D_LURE} flap open in the wind.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='{HERO} tucks {ROUTE_D_LURE} safely under her arm, ready for flying; the {GOAL} keeps growing; she can bring it back to {ENTRANCE} or call {GUESTS} and start the {GOAL} now'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=44 beats='{HERO} lets {ROUTE_D_LURE} flap open and a gust tugs it into {ROUTE_D_MISHAP} that wraps the string around a fence post; she untangles the muddle, laughing, and heads back to {ENTRANCE} to try again'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=44 beats='{ROUTE_E_LURE} dozes on {ROUTE_E_CHAR} and {HERO} wants to invite him to the {GOAL}; his round eyes are shut tight; she can hoot softly to wake him gently or shake the whole branch'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='{ROUTE_E_LURE} blinks his big eyes, yawns, and says yes to the {GOAL} with a happy hoot; {GUESTS} are growing; {HERO} can walk him back to {ENTRANCE} or call {GUESTS} and start the {GOAL} now'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=44 beats='{HERO} shakes the branch and {ROUTE_E_MISHAP} tumbles down and buries her in a giggly pile; {ROUTE_E_LURE} only snores a little louder; she brushes off the leaves and heads back to {ENTRANCE} to try again'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='{HERO} looks for {ROUTE_F_LURE} to play {GOAL} tunes; it sits closed on {ROUTE_F_CHAR}; she can lift the lid carefully and peek inside or give the handle a big fast wind'>>

choices.label: Give the handle a big fast wind.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='{ROUTE_F_LURE} tinkles a soft, sweet {GOAL} tune and {HERO} hums along; the {GOAL} keeps growing; she can carry it back to {ENTRANCE} or call {GUESTS} and start the {GOAL} now'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=44 beats='{HERO} winds the handle too fast and {ROUTE_F_LURE} plays {ROUTE_F_MISHAP} that makes her paws dance all wrong; she giggles at the muddle and heads back to {ENTRANCE} to try again slowly'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='{HERO} rings {SIGNAL} and {GUESTS} come waddling from every corner of {THRESHOLD}; {ENTRANCE} is ready at last; she waves them all over to {ENTRANCE}'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='{GUESTS} settle in a happy ring on {ENTRANCE}, wiggling with excitement; everything {HERO} fetched is piled up in the middle; she looks at the growing feast and gets ready to begin'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='{HERO} spreads out {ROUTE_A_OFFER}, {ROUTE_B_OFFER}, and all the treats in the warm sun; {GUESTS} lick their lips and wiggle their paws; she decides how to start the {GOAL} fun'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='{ROUTE_A_OFFER} and {ROUTE_B_OFFER} go round the circle and everyone munches happily in the sunshine; the {GOAL} is merry and full; {HERO} thinks of the coziest way to keep the good fun going'>>

choices.label: Curl up for a cozy nap in the sun.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=36 beats='{GUESTS} are ready to play in the breezy {THRESHOLD} and {HERO} claps with joy; the {GOAL} is a happy, growing party; she decides which cheerful game {GUESTS} should have'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=46 beats='everyone joins paws and sings {SONG_PRIZE} under the warm sun, swaying together in {THRESHOLD}; {HERO}'s {GOAL} has come together just perfectly, and her heart is as full as {ROUTE_A_OFFER}'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='{ROUTE_F_LURE} tinkles its sweet tune and all {GUESTS} sway and hum along on {ENTRANCE}; {HERO}'s {GOAL} is cozy and complete, and she beams at every one of her happy friends'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='full of {ROUTE_A_OFFER} and {ROUTE_B_OFFER}, {GUESTS} and {HERO} curl up in a soft heap on {ENTRANCE} for a happy afternoon nap; the {GOAL} she built piece by piece is perfect and peaceful'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='{ROUTE_C_LURE} rolls round and round the giggling ring of {GUESTS} in {THRESHOLD}; {HERO}'s {GOAL} is a bouncy, happy success and all {GUESTS} cheer for one more roll'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='{ROUTE_D_LURE} dips and soars over {THRESHOLD} while {GUESTS} cheer from {ENTRANCE}; {HERO}'s {GOAL} has come together beautifully and she flies {ROUTE_D_LURE} proudly in the warm breeze'>>
